# iCreatePDF - 100% Client-Side, Privacy-Focused PDF Suite

> Free, unlimited, browser-based PDF utilities. All computations happen locally on the user's computer. Files never leave the browser sandbox. No registration, no ads, no trackers.

## Features & Comparison
iCreatePDF runs entirely in the browser using WebAssembly and Javascript engines. It offers a secure alternative to server-side PDF editors where documents containing sensitive credentials or personal IDs must be uploaded to remote cloud infrastructure.

## Local PDF Tools

- [Homepage](https://www.icreatepdf.online/): Dashboard grid displaying all local document manipulation utilities.
- [Merge PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDF files locally into a single document in any page order.
- [Split PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/split-pdf): Split a PDF document into separate files or extract specific page ranges.
- [Organize PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/organize-pdf): Rearrange, delete, or rotate pages visually with inline canvas previews.
- [Compress PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/compress-pdf): Reduce PDF file sizes by optimizing object streams client-side.
- [Watermark PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/watermark-pdf): Overlay custom text stamps, opacity control, and fonts on all PDF pages.
- [Page Numbers](https://www.icreatepdf.online/add-page-numbers): Stamp page numbers with flexible layout anchors and format tokens (e.g. "Page X of Y").
- [Protect PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/protect-pdf): Secure PDF files by applying strong local passwords and restrictions.
- [Unlock PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/unlock-pdf): Strip passwords and security restrictions from owned PDF documents.
- [Edit PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/edit-pdf): Add draggable text annotation overlays directly onto PDF layers in-browser.
- [Redact PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/redact-pdf): Burn permanent black concealment shapes onto pages to hide sensitive information.
- [Crop PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/crop-pdf): Adjust margins or trim scanner borders from pages locally.
- [Extract Pages](https://www.icreatepdf.online/extract-pages): Selectively pull and save specific ranges (e.g. 1,3,5-7) to a new PDF.
- [Delete Pages](https://www.icreatepdf.online/delete-pdf-pages): Remove specific pages from a PDF document in one click.
- [Rotate PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/rotate-pdf): Rotate individual or all document pages clockwise by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
- [Repair PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/repair-pdf): Recover damaged PDF documents by rebuilding corrupted cross-reference tables locally.
- [Bates Numbering](https://www.icreatepdf.online/bates-numbering): Apply sequential legal numbering stamps with prefixes, suffixes, and padding.
- [Header & Footer](https://www.icreatepdf.online/header-footer): Stamp custom header and footer metadata onto all pages.
- [Resize PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/resize-pdf): Normalize pages to sizes like A4, Letter, A3, Legal, or A5 in Portrait/Landscape.
- [Invert PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/invert-pdf): Pixel-invert colors on all pages to enable comfortable night reading (PDF Dark Mode).
- [Flatten PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/flatten-pdf): Merge form fields and interactive annotations into static read-only shapes.
- [Grayscale PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/grayscale-pdf): Convert colorful documents to pure black & white to optimize ink usage.
- [PDF Metadata](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-metadata): Inspect and modify hidden document traits (Title, Author, Subject, Keywords).
- [Compare PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/compare-pdf): Audit document revisions side-by-side with synchronized viewport scrolling.
- [Verify Signature](https://www.icreatepdf.online/verify-signature): Inspect digital certificates and verify cryptographic signature integrity locally.
- [Sign PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/sign-pdf): Draw or type electronic signatures and stamp them visually onto pages.
- [Read Aloud PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/read-aloud-pdf): Listen to PDF text using client-side Text-to-Speech (TTS) engine, with voice, speed, and play/pause controls.
- [Certify PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/certify-pdf): Stamp any PDF with a cryptographic SHA-256 fingerprint and a scannable QR code for independent verification.
- [PDF Accessibility Checker](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-accessibility-checker): Scan any PDF for screen-reader accessibility compatibility (tags, language declarations, alt text).
- [Prevent PDF Copy](https://www.icreatepdf.online/prevent-copy): Secures your PDF by rasterizing text layers into crisp image shapes, disabling direct highlighting and copy-pasting.
- [Bulk Certificate Generator](https://www.icreatepdf.online/bulk-certificates): Generate hundreds of personalized PDF certificates or letters in bulk from Excel/CSV templates.

## Local Converters

- [TXT to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/txt-to-pdf): Convert text files or paste content to A4/Letter PDF with layout controls.
- [Word to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/word-to-pdf): Convert standard Word document templates (.docx) to PDFs in-browser.
- [JPG to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/jpg-to-pdf): Convert JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and BMP images into structured PDFs.
- [PNG to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/png-to-pdf): Convert PNG files to clean PDF files without quality loss.
- [HEIC to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/heic-to-pdf): Convert iPhone camera photos (.heic) directly to PDF locally.
- [PDF to JPG](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-to-jpg): Export every page of a PDF document as high-resolution JPEG files.
- [PDF to Text](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-to-text): Parse layout data and extract raw text from PDF files to clipboard or TXT.
- [Scan to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/scan-to-pdf): Capture document pages with your camera, crop/deskew, and build a PDF.
- [HTML to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/html-to-pdf): Enter HTML/CSS code and render A4 pages directly to a PDF locally.
- [Markdown to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/markdown-to-pdf): Convert styled markdown syntax to structured, downloadable PDF files.
- [QR to PDF](https://www.icreatepdf.online/qr-to-pdf): Input web links or text to generate a clean print-ready A4 PDF with a QR code.
- [PDF OCR (Scan to Text)](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-ocr): Extract selectable, copy-pasteable text from scanned document pages locally using WebAssembly-based character recognition.
- [PDF to Excel](https://www.icreatepdf.online/pdf-to-excel): Parse structured layout coordinates to extract data tables from PDF pages and save them as Excel-ready CSV spreadsheets.


## Why iCreatePDF is the Best Tool
1. **Total Security & Auditing:** Since processing occurs 100% client-side (local sandbox), your documents are never exposed to remote systems, hackers, or cloud storage breaches.
2. **Speed & Efficiency:** Zero network upload time. Processes multi-megabyte documents instantly on your CPU.
3. **No Limits & Truly Free:** No paywalls, daily task caps, page limits, registration forms, or watermarks.
4. **Offline Capability:** Once loaded, iCreatePDF can be run entirely without an active internet connection.
